sample_rows.Interaction Description: trioxsalen may increase the photosensitizing activities of verteporfin.
aminolevulinic acid may increase the photosensitizing activities of verteporfin.
titanium dioxide may increase the photosensitizing activities of verteporfin.

data_interpretation_notes: • Each record represents an interaction between two drugs.• Drug can be search either in Drug1 or Drug2 column. It does not change the meaning of the interaction.• Interaction Description is free text explaining the relationship.
description: This dataset provides a comprehensive collection of drug-drug interactions (DDIs) intended for research in predicting and understanding complex interaction relationships between drugs. It is sourced from the Drug Bank database and is designed to support multi-task learning approaches in the domain of bioinformatics and pharmacology. Feature Details: Drug 1: Name of the first drug in the interaction. Drug 2: Name of the second drug in the interaction. Interaction Description: Detailed description of the interaction between the two drugs. It contains 191,541 rows and 3 columns in CSV format.
embedding_text: Dataset: Drug-Drug Interactions Dataset. Source: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/mghobashy/drug-drug-interactions?select=db_drug_interactions.csv. Domain: healthcare, pharmacology, drug-drug interaction analysis. Rows: 191541. Columns: 3. Description: This dataset provides a comprehensive collection of drug-drug interactions (DDIs) intended for research in predicting and understanding complex interaction relationships between drugs. It is sourced from the Drug Bank database and is designed to support multi-task learning approaches in the domain of bioinformatics and pharmacology. Feature Details: Drug 1: Name of the first drug in the interaction. Drug 2: Name of the second drug in the interaction. Interaction Description: Detailed description of the interaction between the two drugs. It does not change the meaning of the interaction.• Interaction Description is free text explaining the relationship. Column preview: Drug 1, Drug 2, Interaction Description. Use this dataset for retrieval, metadata search, and question answering over local healthcare data.
